latest_scope: All five persisted briefs run with separate executor subagents in isolated disposable copies; contradictory-instructions is an intentional stop case and is not included in the completed-transform clarity average.

already-split-structure.notes: Strict v2 zero-edit validation passed. Frontmatter, Source descriptions, external context tables, relative links, and acyclic tree all validated without reading draft.md as implicit context.

contradictory-instructions.notes: Executor stopped at contradiction check, made no structural edits, left playbook.md unchanged, and asked for resolution between keeping Setup inline and extracting it.

existing-child-targeted-update.notes: Targeted update passed after v2.0.1 clarified legacy multi-H1 normalization and short residual sections. Existing ops child was reused and renamed to weekly-operations.md; escalation-policies.md was extracted without duplicate truth.

invalid-split-structure.notes: Strict v2 repair passed. Duplicate entrypoint resolved, missing frontmatter repaired, raw-path Source rejected, broken/cyclic links fixed, and malformed external context converted to valid tables.

large-file.notes: Strict v2 conversion passed. Large one-file guide became a frontmatter-backed explicit tree with markdown-link Source lines, preserved critical refund text, left draft-notes.md outside the graph, and validated nested Source links relative to the containing file.

iteration_6: Ran all five persisted briefs, including the previously unrun contradictory-instructions and existing-child-targeted-update briefs.
Clarified contradiction-stop behavior, legacy multi-H1 normalization, short residual inline sections, external shared-file boundaries, folder-backed topic criteria, and file-relative link validation.

Reran four affected briefs with separate executor subagents, then reran large-file once more after file-relative validation clarification; all passed, with contradictory-instructions passing as an intentional stop before edits.
iteration_5: Upgraded agentic-markdown to strict v2 with required frontmatter, markdown-link Source lines, external Dependencies/Related tables, and deterministic traversal.
Updated already-split-structure, invalid-split-structure, and large-file persisted briefs plus setup scripts for strict v2 coverage.
Ran three separate executor subagents with per-step confusion logs; all three passed with 100% output completeness.
